items.title: FOBAS report warns of late year surge in marine fuel quality failures
items.summary: The new analysis, which follows the publication of the H1 report earlier in 2025, highlights a marked deterioration in fuel quality in the second half of 2025.
items.summary_zh: FOBAS報告指出，2025年下半年海洋燃料質量顯著惡化。這項新分析是基於2025年上半年報告的結果。

items.title: Alternative-fuelled ship orders remain significant in 2025
items.summary: Discover how 2025 saw shipowners investing in alternative-fuel vessels, maintaining strong order momentum for a sustainable maritime future.
items.summary_zh: 2025年，船東持續投資於替代燃料船，顯示出對可持續海事未來的強勁訂單動能。

items.title: Biofuels emerge as superyachting’s next big step for decarbonisation
items.summary: Biofuels are emerging as one of the most proven and reliable alternative fuel options for reducing greenhouse gas emissions from shipping.
items.summary_zh: 生物燃料正成為減少航運溫室氣體排放的最可靠替代燃料選項之一。

items.title: LR launches Biofuel Advisory service to help accelerate shipping’s decarbonisation
items.summary: The new service aims to support the shipping industry in safely and efficiently adopting biofuels to reduce greenhouse gas emissions.
items.summary_zh: LR推出生物燃料諮詢服務，旨在協助航運業安全有效地採用生物燃料，以減少溫室氣體排放。

items.title: Global bunker fuel quality holds steady as biofuel blends gain momentum
items.summary: LR’s latest FOBAS Fuel Insight report highlights broadly steady fuel quality with particular issues around high sediments and chemical contamination.
items.summary_zh: LR最新的FOBAS燃料洞察報告顯示，全球燃料品質基本穩定，但存在高沉積物和化學污染的特定問題。

items.title: 20/2025: IMO Guidance on the Carriage of Biofuels Blends by Conventional Bunker Ships
items.summary: The International Maritime Organisation has approved its Interim Guidance on the Carriage of Blends of Biofuels and MARPOL Annex I Cargoes by Conventional Bunker Ships
items.summary_zh: 國際海事組織已批准其關於傳統加油船運輸生物燃料混合物及MARPOL附錄I貨物的臨時指導。

items.title: Global Fuel Finder enhanced with new biofuels capability
items.summary: Discover Lloyd’s Register's enhanced Global Fuel Finder, now featuring biofuels. Make informed, sustainable fuel choices for safer marine operations.
items.summary_zh: Lloyd's Register 的全球燃料尋找器已增強，現在具備生物燃料功能。這有助於做出明智且可持續的燃料選擇，以確保更安全的海洋作業。

items.title: Significant increase in biofuel usage to meet GHG reduction targets
items.summary: The latest FOBAS Fuel Insight Report highlights rising biofuel uptake, ongoing issues with off-specification fuels and the impact of new regulatory measures.
items.summary_zh: 最新的FOBAS燃料洞察報告指出，生物燃料的使用顯著增加，並持續存在不符合規格的燃料問題，以及新法規措施的影響。

items.title: 21/2024 - Updated IMO fuel oil sampling guidelines
items.summary: The IMO has published a joint circular updating the fuel oil sampling guidelines for compliance verification with MARPOL Annex VI and SOLAS Chapter II-2.
items.summary_zh: 國際海事組織（IMO）發布了聯合通函，更新了燃油取樣指導方針，以便符合MARPOL附錄VI和SOLAS第II-2章的合規驗證要求。

items.title: LR and Metcore link up for Mass Flow Meter certification
items.summary: Independently accredited service will help ensure accuracy & reliability of bunker quantities
items.summary_zh: LR和Metcore合作進行質量流量計的認證，獨立認證服務將有助於確保燃料量的準確性和可靠性。

items.title: Fuel quality remains critical issue for the maritime industry
items.summary: Lloyd’s Register has released its Fuel Quality Report 2024, offering vital insights into the evolving landscape of marine fuel quality.
items.summary_zh: Lloyd's Register 發布了 2024 年燃料質量報告，提供了有關海洋燃料質量變化的重要見解。燃料質量仍然是海事行業的一個關鍵問題。

items.title: 06/2024 - Information about the flashpoint of fuels on Bunker Delivery Notes
items.summary: Find out more about the flashpoint of fuels on Bunker Delivery Note.

items.title: 18/2023 - IMO publishes interim guidance on the calculations of biofuel carbon conversion factor (CF) for IMO DCS and CII calculations
items.summary: IMO publishes interim guidance on the calculations of biofuel carbon conversion factor (CF) for IMO DCS and CII calculations
items.summary_zh: 國際海事組織（IMO）發布了有關生物燃料碳轉換係數（CF）計算的臨時指導，適用於IMO DCS和CII計算。

items.title: The rising importance of fuel testing for superyachts
items.summary: Testing fuels is the best way for superyachts to mitigate the safety risks and operational issues that prevail even with distillate fuels.
items.summary_zh: 對於超級遊艇來說，測試燃料是減輕安全風險和操作問題的最佳方法，即使是使用蒸餾燃料時也不例外。

items.title: 18/2022 - MARPOL ANNEX VI and the use of Marine Biofuels
items.summary: In recent years ship operators have been looking at the possibility of using other marine biofuel grades, either as a replacement fuel or a blend component.
items.summary_zh: 近年來，船舶營運商正在考慮使用其他海洋生物燃料等級，作為替代燃料或混合成分。

items.title: Capital and LR explore the use of biofuels in pilot research project
items.summary: Biofuel trials onboard Capital Ship Management Corp. tanker to advance research for alternative fuels.
items.summary_zh: 資本船舶管理公司正在其油輪上進行生物燃料試驗，以推進替代燃料的研究。

items.title: A less prescriptive future for shipping maintenance lies ahead
items.summary: Usman Muhammad, Product Manager - Fuel Advisory at LR, analyses issues and explores actions to avoid costly failures associated with fuel transitions.
items.summary_zh: Usman Muhammad，LR的燃料顧問產品經理，分析了與燃料轉換相關的問題，並探討了避免昂貴故障的行動。

items.title: The importance of cold flow properties of very low sulphur fuel oils.
items.summary: Douglas Raitt Regional at Lloyd's Register looks at why it is critical for ship owners to order bunker fuel based on the suitability of its use.
items.summary_zh: 道格拉斯·賴特（Douglas Raitt）在倫敦保險集團（Lloyd's Register）指出，船東在訂購燃料油時，必須根據其適用性來選擇低硫燃料油的冷流特性，這是至關重要的。

items.title: BLOC announces demonstrator consortium for blockchain use in bunkering
items.summary: Consortium will demonstrate the application of blockchain as a means of facilitating an increase in transparency and traceability in marine fuel supply chain
items.summary_zh: BLOC宣布成立示範聯盟，將展示區塊鏈在船舶燃料供應鏈中的應用。此技術旨在提高透明度和可追溯性。

items.title: Guardian Marine Testing acquisition.
items.summary: Acquisition combines Lloyd’s Register’s deep technical expertise with Guardian Marine Testing’s swift and efficient fuel testing operation
items.summary_zh: 收購將勞埃德註冊公司的深厚技術專長與Guardian Marine Testing迅速高效的燃料測試運營結合在一起。
